unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Printing and Scanning
drDigitalIntro: To print from your computer, press Ctrl+P in any app — a print dialog appears. Choose your printer, number of copies, and which pages. Set up a printer in System Settings > Printers & Scanners. To scan a document, place it on the scanner and use Image Capture or the printer's own app. You can also scan documents with your phone camera — many apps like Notes create a PDF scan automatically.

playgroundTask.question: You want to print an email. You're in the Mail app. What keyboard shortcut opens the print dialog?

drDigitalSuccess: Ctrl+P opens the print dialog in almost every app on your computer — it's a universal shortcut.
drDigitalHint: P for Print — which command shortcut uses P?
